title: sarcochilus spurius
intro: Sarcochilus spurius, also known as the Spurless Sarcochilus, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its expectorant properties, which help to relieve coughs and colds by loosening and thinning mucus. The health benefits of Sarcochilus spurius include reducing inflammation and promoting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or tincture to be used in the treatment of respiratory issues.
